question: I was thinking about our previous conversation about data privacy and security. You mentioned that companies use two-factor authentication to enhance security. Can you remind me what kind of two-factor authentication methods you were referring to?
ground_truth_answer: I mentioned biometric authentication or one-time passwords (OTP) as examples of two-factor authentication methods.

retrieval_results.context:
The user believes that companies' data privacy and security measures are excessive because the user considers their personal data not valuable.
The user feels that security steps are too much hassle and prefers simpler authentication methods to avoid remembering multiple passwords.
